creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
The Manaworld version update to 0.0.22 featuring improved female
        character art, monster sounds, and shops.

        Note: The update host changed to "http://updates.themanaworld.org".     
        If you're upgrading from a previous version and hadn't changed
        it yet, either update it in ${HOME}/.tmw/config.xml to

           <option name="updatehost" value="http://updates.themanaworld.org/"/>

        or delete your config file. In the latter case it will be
        recreated with the new default setting.
